edges.note: The capability's whole subject is researching one entity and depositing it as a row record.
Step 1 reads the table's column keys, types, and select options to coerce each researched value to its column's declared type.
Reads the table definition via `import repo; repo.load('table',...)` before researching.
Soft form of OVERVIEW rules 2/4/5 (type conformance and provenance) that validate.py's integrity_checks() enforces after every write.
The synthesis is written onto the table record as `bottom_line`; it judges what one table now says.
Persists the synthesis via repo.load/repo.save on the table record (rule 8: one definition, rendered by both card and viewer).
Explicit contrast: research-row is delegated because the conversation doesn't need the page text; bottom-line runs in-context because the conversation is where its value lands.
The dashboard is the live index of everything the workspace can show; the index view is the user's window it keeps up.
